description: 86-line two-speaker conversation covering a mix of calendar management actions: 2 updates (rescheduled meetings), 1 delete (cancelled vendor demo), and 3 creates (new meetings). Tests all three CRUD operations in a single long conversation with calendar context.

events.title: Product Strategy Workshop
events.reasoning: Alice says the product strategy workshop needs to move from Tuesday 2 PM to Tuesday 10 AM because legal needs the conference room in the afternoon. February 24th, 10 AM to noon.

events.title: Engineering Standup
events.reasoning: Alice says the Wednesday 9 AM engineering standup is being pushed to 10 AM starting this week (February 25th) to accommodate Priya's standing morning conflict.

events.title: Synthex Data Tools Demo
events.reasoning: Alice cancels the Thursday Synthex demo because the vendor has been acquired and the evaluation is no longer needed.

events.title: Sprint Retrospective
events.reasoning: Bob flags that Dave is travelling Monday February 23rd, so the sprint retro originally at 3 PM Monday must be rescheduled. Alice moves it to Tuesday February 24th at 9 AM for 1 hour.

events.title: Vendor Landscape Review
events.reasoning: Alice creates a new 2-hour vendor landscape review on Thursday February 26th at 2 PM. Bob, Carol, and Dave are invited. Dave's availability is being confirmed separately.

events.title: Skip-Level with Priya
events.reasoning: Alice creates a new 45-minute skip-level meeting with Priya (a team member) on Friday February 27th at 11 AM as part of a new quarterly skip-level program.

events.title: Lunch-and-Learn: Product Prioritization
events.reasoning: Alice creates the first lunch-and-learn session for Monday March 2nd at noon, 1 hour total. She will present on product prioritization. Open to the whole building.
events.assumptions: Duration 1 hour: 45 min content + 15 min Q&A

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 7 calendar operations in this conversation: 2 rescheduled meetings (product strategy workshop moved from Tue 2 PM to 10 AM, engineering standup moved from Wed 9 AM to 10 AM), 1 cancellation (Synthex demo deleted), 1 reschedule (sprint retro moved from Mon 3 PM to Tue 9 AM), and 3 new events created (vendor landscape review Thu 2 PM, skip-level with Priya Fri 11 AM, lunch-and-learn Mon Mar 2 noon).

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Calendar context provides 4 existing events for the updates and delete. existing_event_id values 1-4 correspond to the 1-based index of entries in calendar_context. The sprint retrospective reschedule (ID 4) is raised by Bob late in the conversation — tests that events discussed mid-meeting and at the end are both captured.
